summary: Add open command for the keyless https://open.er-api.com/v6/latest/{base} endpoint with mandatory attribution string in output.
reason: ExchangeRate-API operates a no-key endpoint with daily refresh; using it requires the Rates By Exchange Rate API attribution per their terms. Read body via io.LimitReader(_, 5<<20) so a misconfigured upstream cannot OOM the process.
validated_outcome: open USD returns 161 rates plus attribution; HTTP 429 surfaces a helpful message redirecting to the keyed endpoint.
